Karl-Anthony Towns.note: Elite center/local rebound profile validated. Towns combined stable minutes, high efficiency, and dominant team rebound share.

Josh Hart.note: Hart failed because Knicks rebound distribution consolidated toward Towns, OG, and Robinson while blowout reduced late urgency.

Jalen Johnson.note: ATL primary wing/big rebounder was the only Hawk with a strong board profile; team total rebounds collapsed overall.

OG Anunoby.note: Secondary NYK wing rebound spike. Long misses and ATL low conversion helped OG collect defensive boards.

Mitchell Robinson.note: High per-minute center rebound presence; contributed to Hart suppression.

diagnostic_findings: NYK dominated glass 48-27, creating a clear rebound imbalance that supported center/forward overs on NYK but crushed ATL secondary rebound opportunities.
Towns over 11.5 was structurally correct: 34 minutes, 14 rebounds, 6 assists, and NYK controlled defensive glass with 40 defensive rebounds.
Hart over 8.5 was a poor fit after patch logic: his rebounds were cannibalized by Towns 14, OG 10, Robinson 6, and McBride 3.
ATL attempted 42 threes and shot only 31.0%, but NYK’s rebound collection was concentrated with big/forward bodies rather than Hart.
ATL’s team rebound total was extremely weak at 27 despite Jalen Johnson reaching 10. Avoid broad ATL rebound exposure unless targeting Johnson-type primary rebound role.

model_lessons.winning_archetype: Primary center rebounder on team with dominant glass edge
model_lessons.losing_archetype: High-line guard/wing rebound over when frontcourt and secondary forwards have stronger collection lanes
model_lessons.environment: NYK blowout with efficient offense and one-sided rebounding control
model_lessons.execution_takeaway: Towns was an A-tier single/2-leg anchor; Hart should have been downgraded under congestion/distribution logic.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Team projects +8 or greater rebound advantage and primary center has stable 30+ minutes
patch_recommendations.effect: Upgrade primary center rebound overs by +0.4 to +0.9 median and raise single eligibility.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Wing/guard rebound line >= 8.5 while team has primary center plus secondary forward/big rebound threats active
patch_recommendations.effect: Downgrade wing/guard rebound over by -0.8 to -1.4 median unless player has elite rebound chance share.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Favorite projects or creates 20+ point margin and prop player is not center-local rebound anchor
patch_recommendations.effect: Reduce secondary rebound over probability by 3-6 percentage points.
